open_risks_summary: Zotero UI/import flows cannot be fully verified with Jest alone.
MenuManager API: onShowing is synchronous; async visibility requires cache pattern with explicit invalidation.
FTL .label attribute requirement verified from menuManager.js source but needs manual Zotero 9 testing.
patchMethod() restores originals but skips if target was externally modified; logs warning instead.
ctx.collectionTreeRow typed as _ZoteroTypes.CollectionTree but runtime is Zotero.CollectionTreeRow — needs explicit cast.
fetchDuplicates({ refresh: true }) does NOT trigger notifier events — cache invalidation must be explicit.
M009 feature reorganization is a large-scale move — requires careful import path updates and test verification.
ChromeUtils.importESModule type declaration returns any — future milestone may add narrower type.
jest.Mock<any> cast in merger.test.ts is a workaround for Jest 30 / ts-jest 29 type inference gaps.
